description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & Deploy that runs on a schedule and on workflow dispatch. The workflow prepares a build, then uses the output to conditionally run jobs on different platforms (OSX, Linux, Linux RPM, Linux Docker, Windows) with various networks (TEST, BETA, LIVE). Each job checks out the code, prepares the environment, builds an artifact, and deploys it to S3, Docker Hub, or other targets.
